description_short: Maintain good sleep posture without tossing and turning. This body pillow is super comfortable for to-be-mothers, too!

faq_specs.question: What is the purpose of a body pillow?
faq_specs.answer: Body pillow is made with moms-to-be in mind. They support your back and make it easier to sleep on your side, which may be more comfortable after 20 weeks.

faq_specs.question: Which shaped pillow is best during pregnancy?
faq_specs.answer: An I or U-shaped quality body pillow can improve the alignment of your spine, back, and hips.

faq_specs.question: Is pregnancy body pillow helpful in pregnancy for back pain?
faq_specs.answer: Yes, they help reduce back pain during pregnancy to a large extent.
